format_spec: A single JSON object with exactly two keys, title and description. title 50-60 characters including the brand and a geographic signal; description 140-160 characters. No extra text.
known_good: {"title": "Riverside Dental - Family Dentist in Manchester", "description": "Riverside Dental is a trusted family and cosmetic dental clinic in Manchester, UK, offering checkups, emergency care, and private treatments."}
